items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has success using his jab in exchanges.
items.quote: he was having a lot of success with that jab, right? Work that jab.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis maintains a low stance which leaves him vulnerable to high kicks.
items.quote: Benoit Saint Denis has a low stance sometimes, right? And that can leave him open for high kicks.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett possesses effective body kicks.
items.quote: Paddy has good blasting body kicks.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis absorbed excessive damage in his fight against Elizeu Zaleski dos Santos.
items.quote: there was so much damage that Benoit Saint Denis took that fight against Aleksei Oleinik.
